ocr.text: In the competitive landscape of the Asia-Pacific shipping industry, understanding the dynamics of ship operating expenses is
crucial for enhancing operational efficiency and profitability. The following table delineates a comprehensive breakdown of
operating expenses for ONE Ocean Network Express, offering insights that are pivotal for strategic decision-making.
Depreciation  OtherExpenses  TotalExpenses  PercentageofRevenue  CostperTEU  NetOperatingIncome  ProfitMargin  Remarks
NetOperatingIncome  $10M  N/A  $200  N/A  N/A  N/A  N/A
ProfitMargin  15%  N/A  N/A  N/A  N/A  Remarks  Fuelpricesstable
Maintenanceonschedule  Crewrecruitmentongoing  Insurancerenewalpending  Depreciationasexpected  Othercostsundercontrol  Overallexpensesmanaged  Revenuegrowthsteady  Futurecostsanalyzed
Key metrics, such as Total Expenses and Profit Margin, provide a clear view of the financial health and operational efficacy of
the fleet. Notably, the analysis reveals the impact of Depreciation on overall costs, emphasizing the significance of asset
management in influencing net operating income. Additionally, the table highlights the Percentage of Revenue attributed to
various expense categories, enabling stakeholders to assess cost structures relative to earnings. By scrutinizing these metrics,
industry leaders can identify areas for potential cost reduction and revenue enhancement, fostering a more sustainable business
model amidst fluctuating market conditions. This detailed examination serves as a foundational element for understanding the
economic implications of operational decisions within the maritime sector, ultimately guiding future investments and resource
allocation strategies in a rapidly evolving marketplace.
